## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use Case

Explain what this would help you do in Home Assistant.

## Evidence

If the request depends on an iStore API field, include only sanitized field
names, units, and response structure. Do not include raw payloads.

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] I removed account details, tokens, cookies, and Authorization headers.
- [ ] I removed site names, addresses, IDs, NMI values, and serial numbers.
- [ ] I did not attach raw HAR files or raw API payloads.
